parameters.query:
WITH lead_quality AS (
  SELECT
    LOWER(service_interest) as service,
    COUNT(*) as leads_7d,
    ROUND(AVG(ai_quality_score), 1) as avg_qual
  FROM ad_leads
  WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
    AND service_interest IS NOT NULL
    AND service_interest != ''
  GROUP BY LOWER(service_interest)
),
budget_history AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(split_part(reason, ':', 1)) as campaign_key,
    MAX(executed_at) as last_change,
    COUNT(*) as changes_7d,
    SUM(change_percent) as total_pct
  FROM budget_adjustments
  WHERE executed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY TRIM(split_part(reason, ':', 1))
)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'lead_quality', COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_object_agg(service, json_build_object('leads_7d', leads_7d, 'avg_qual', avg_qual)) FROM lead_quality),
    '{}'::json
  ),
  'budget_history', COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_object_agg(campaign_key, json_build_object('last_change', last_change, 'changes_7d', changes_7d, 'total_pct', total_pct)) FROM budget_history),
    '{}'::json
  )
) as stats;

=INSERT INTO budget_adjustments (old_daily_budget_sek, new_daily_budget_sek, change_percent, reason, trigger_metric, metric_value, decision_factors, automated, executed_at, success)
SELECT (i->>'old')::numeric, (i->>'new')::numeric, (i->>'change')::numeric, i->>'reason', 'cpl', (i->'metrics'->>'cpl')::numeric, i->'metrics', true, NOW(), true
FROM json_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.dbLogs) }}'::json) i
RETURNING id;
